=======
 Files
=======

This catalog contains the following files:

#. ``cp1251_cp1251.txt``: input for cp1251->utf8 recode test
#. ``cp1251_utf8.txt``: expected output for cp1251->utf8 recode test
#. ``128-255.txt``: byte sequence from 128 to 255 to test one-byte encodings supporting all characters in this range (fits for KOI8-R, does not fit for cp1251)
#. ``128-255_koi8_utf8.txt``: expected output for koi8r->utf8 recode test of ``128-255.txt``
#. ``utf8_simple.fb2``: FB2 sample file in UTF8
#. ``cp1251_simple.fb2``: FB2 sample file in CP1251
#. ``koi8r_simple.fb2``: FB2 sample file in KOI8-R
